summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. Backend: 53/53 pytest passing (27 new tests in test_iteration2.py + 26 iteration-1 tests after fixing API contract regression). Frontend: 9-step E2E flow passes — cantidad=3 creates 3 batched cards (#1/#2/#3); sell modal shows select-vendedor; Sales page shows view-list/view-rank tabs with rank-list populated by sold_by_name aggregation; sale row shows seller name; Members page accessible via members-btn; creator sees delete-group-btn and edit/delete incident buttons; member (joined via codigo_union) correctly sees no delete-group, no set-role-*, no remove-*, no edit-inc/delete-inc.

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) height(-1)' warning briefly on first mount before container measures (carried over from iteration 1, non-blocking).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 759 lines — past the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into modules (auth, groups, members, products, sales, incidents, files, dashboard).
GET /api/sales/stats fetches up to 5000 products into memory and aggregates in Python; should be a Mongo $group aggregation pipeline as volume grows.
POST /api/products with cantidad runs N separate insert_one calls in a loop; use insert_many for atomicity and perf when cantidad is large (capped at 500).
Role permission checks are repeated; consider extracting a decorator/dependency `require_role([...])` to DRY up endpoints.
DELETE /api/groups cascades products + incidencias + clears user codigo_grupo/role but does not delete uploaded files in object storage; orphaned files remain.

/api/groups/members/{id}/role check order: creator-demotion check is after self-check but before promotion-to-creator check is fine; however target.get('role') may be None (legacy users), so comparing == 'creator' is safe but consider normalizing on read.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new flows: cantidad, vendedor, rank tabs, members page, role-based UI gating, incident edit)

test_credentials: Tests register fresh users per run; existing demo1@test.com / password123 is unused.
seed_data_creation: Per-run users prefixed with test_it2_<uuid> and test_a/b_<uuid>; groups/products prefixed TEST_. Group is cascade-deleted at end of test_iteration2.py suite.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py is a single-file pytest module with a session-scoped scenario fixture (creator A + members B/C + later D). Tests must run sequentially in declaration order (state mutates via scenario dict). To rerun: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py -v. Frontend BottomNav uses fixed position bottom-0; on certain timing windows clicking nav-* immediately after a route change can race against AppLayout mounting — prefer goto(url) over click for nav links in automated tests. Roles: creator (admin_id of group), admin_total, admin_menor, member.
rca of the issue: n/a — no failures observed in this iteration.
